functions.label: generateAllComputedFeatures
description: Generates all computed features by running all registered generators in parallel.

functions.label: generateSignificantEvents
description:
Generate significant event definitions using a reasoning agent that fetches
stream features (including computed dataset analysis) via tool calls.

children.label: kind
description:
What to return.
- ['query'] enables "queries-only KIs".
- default is empty array (or omitted), which returns everything.
